name: Last Sighting
short_description: Wake up to the sound of your neighbors dog outside. Take your trusty lantern and escort him home. With night looming. Use your lantern to guide you on your way. With something lurking in the night and your car broken down you'll have to find a way to defend yourself as you make your way to safety.
detailed_description: With night falling and odd lights flashing off in the distance hours ago. Awaken to the sound of your neighbors farm dog barking outside. Lead Jeffery the dog home using your trusty lantern to light the way, Just make sure to keep track of your fuel. Deal with slight puzzles along this Sci-fi horror adventure and learn what has happened to your neighbor. With something hiding in the dark and your car broken down. You must find a way to protect yourself and Jeffery and get away from the area. Before its to late.
